name: shadi-flow
description: Desktop voice dictation and flow-writing app.

scripts.build:fluid:force: mkdir -p native/fluid-helper/.build/clang-module-cache && (CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH="$PWD/native/fluid-helper/.build/clang-module-cache" swift build -c release --package-path native/fluid-helper || test -x native/fluid-helper/.build/release/shadiflow-fluid-helper) && mkdir -p native/bin && cp native/fluid-helper/.build/release/shadiflow-fluid-helper native/bin/shadiflow-fluid-helper

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ShadiFlow needs microphone access to transcribe your speech.
extendInfo.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: ShadiFlow can use speech recognition as a fallback transcription mode.
